form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 390m at Warrnambool beaten 8 lengths (23.06) behind Paw Amaran in a Grade 5 on April 2. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning off back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2.5 lengths over 400m at Geelong in a handy (23.00), beating Aston Saturn. Will find this a bit tougher, likely to find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Placed last time (23.14) at Geelong in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 8 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from eight starts. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when eighth (26.90) at Geelong at last run and returns here after a ten weeks break. Looks a strong top-three chance.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 390m at this track clocking 22.65. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.
